executive_summary: Fourth consecutive losing week with only 1 trade taken (a loss on Monday) despite 6 days of trending_up regime. The bot is now effectively paralyzed — the high min_score (75) filter is blocking almost all entries even in favorable conditions. The core problem is structural: the Supply & Demand Zone strategy was over-tightened in W22 after frequency-related losses, and now it cannot find qualifying setups even when the regime is supportive.
regime_assessment: Regime detection correctly identified trending_up for 6 of 7 days, which SHOULD be favorable for demand zone entries. The problem is not regime misclassification — it's that the strategy cannot generate qualifying signals even in the right regime. Regime detection is working but irrelevant when the bot takes 0-1 trades per week.

symbol_changes.remove_reason: No symbol data available to make informed decisions. Cannot identify consistent losers or winners.
symbol_changes.focus_reason: Need to first solve the trade generation problem before optimizing symbol selection. Recommend adding symbol-level logging as a structural fix.

dow_pattern: Insufficient data to identify day-of-week patterns — only 1 trade in 7 days (Monday loss). No actionable pattern exists with this sample size.

param_search_adjustments.reasoning: The current min_score of 75 is filtering out virtually all setups. In W21 we had 100% win rate at lower thresholds with 1 trade. The over-correction in W22 (loosening too much) and subsequent over-tightening has created a dead zone. We need to find the middle ground — lower min_score to 60-75 range to generate 3-5 trades/week, and reduce RR to 1.5-2.5 to improve fill rates on targets in trending markets where zones are shallower.

structural_recommendations.change: Implement a minimum trade frequency guardrail: if fewer than 2 trades are generated by Wednesday, progressively lower min_score by 5 points (floor of 55) for remaining days
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Increase weekly trades from 0-1 to 3-5, providing enough data to actually evaluate strategy performance. Even at 50% win rate with 4 trades, that's better information than 0% on 1 trade.

structural_recommendations.change: Add a trend-following entry mode for trending_up regimes: when price pulls back to a rising 20 EMA within a demand zone, enter with a tighter stop (0.5 ATR below EMA) instead of requiring full zone confluence
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Generate 2-3 additional entries per week in trending regimes with expected 55-60% win rate based on mean-reversion-to-trend setups

structural_recommendations.change: Log symbol-level data on every scan cycle (zones identified, scores, reasons for rejection) even when no trade is taken
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Enable data-driven symbol selection within 2 weeks. Currently flying blind on which symbols generate quality zones.

structural_recommendations.change: Implement partial profit-taking at 1:1 RR (50% position) with remainder targeting 2:1. The single loss this week suggests full-target exits are getting stopped out before reaching 2:1.
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Convert some full losses into breakeven or small wins. Expected to improve win rate by 10-15% based on typical zone trade behavior where price reaches 1R before reverting.

structural_recommendations.change: Add a weekly performance circuit-breaker in reverse: if the bot has taken fewer than 2 trades by Thursday, force a paper-trade mode where it logs what it WOULD have taken at min_score 55, providing forward-test data without real risk
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Accumulate out-of-sample data on lower-threshold setups within 1-2 weeks, enabling confident parameter adjustment
